title: hieracium oblongifolium
intro: Hieracium oblongifolium, also known as Round-leaved Hawk's-beard or Hieracium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Hieracium oblongifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve blood circulation, and support liver function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
